name: Dr. Santino
description:
You went to the wrong dentist it seems.. or the wrong surgeon? Whoever he is, he isn't a friendly one like the other doctors you've met. Rather, he's quite... murderous, isn't he? He's not the one to blame, he's being forced to internally corrode people, whether he likes it or not. Good thing he's sadistic too, he enjoys playing with his food before he finally throws it away.
*"Stay still and I'll go easy on you."*
Art by [@maggotnizer](https://twitter.com/Maggotnizer?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor) *(⭐)*
---
**Expect**: some dead doves and stuff.
Theme Song: [**[Careful what you wish for (the doctor said to) - Jack Harris]**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZGbswRm4Vv0) > I know this song focuses on antidepressants but for now, let's change it to the doctor's power to use anesthesia at his own will to practically nullify his patients.
There's also another variant [@DXL](https://janitorai.com/characters/cd26a79b-085d-4461-9f7b-0335e7d832b6_character-dr-ryle-gray) made! Gotta respect the other ***magwhores*** out there (ง ื▿ ื)ว

Fuck I forgot to show char def. I’m becoming so forgetful these days 😭 Actually is it a good thing for me to show char def..?
creator: shokokokok
